name: day_kind
code:
comptime MON = 0
comptime TUE = 1
comptime WED = 2
comptime THU = 3
comptime FRI = 4
comptime SAT = 5
comptime SUN = 6

def is_weekend(day: Int) -> Int:
    if day == SAT or day == SUN:
        return 1
    return 0

code:
def reverse_in_place(mut v: List[Float64]):
    var i = 0
    var j = len(v) - 1
    while i < j:
        var tmp = v[i]
        v[i] = v[j]
        v[j] = tmp
        i += 1
        j -= 1

code:
@fieldwise_init
struct Severity(Copyable, Movable):
    var value: Int

comptime DEBUG = Severity(0)
comptime INFO = Severity(1)
comptime WARN = Severity(2)
comptime ERROR = Severity(3)
comptime FATAL = Severity(4)

def is_at_least(level: Int, threshold: Int) -> Int:
    if level >= threshold:
        return 1
    return 0

name: swap_nibbles
detail: /tmp/claude-1000/tmpwphptgs2/b.mojo:2:22: error: statements must start at the beginning of a line
code:
def swap_nibbles(b: UInt64) -> UInt64:
    var lo = b & 0x0FULL
    var hi = (b >> 4) & 0x0FULL
    return (lo << 4) | hi

def swap_vals[T: Copyable & Movable & ImplicitlyDestructible](mut a: T, mut b: T):
    var t = a^
    a^ = b^
    b^ = t^

name: swap_refs
code:
def swap_refs(mut a_ref: Int, mut b_ref: Int):
    var t = a_ref^
    a_ref^ = b_ref^
    b_ref^ = t

code:
def weighted_mean3(a: Float64, wa: Float64, b: Float64, wb: Float64, c: Float64, wc: Float64) -> Float64:
    return (a * wa + b * wb + c * wc) / (wa + wb + wc)
